gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5 / 344)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5 / 344)
text: رَأَيْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (عليه السلام) يَتَخَلَّلُ بَسَاتِينَ الْكُوفَةِ فَانْتَهَى إِلَى نَخْلَةٍ فَتَوَضَّأَ عِنْدَهَا ثُمَّ رَكَعَ وَ سَجَدَ فَأَحْصَيْتُ فِي سُجُودِهِ خَمْسَمِائَةِ تَسْبِيحَةٍ ثُمَّ اسْتَنَدَ إِلَى النَّخْلَةِ فَدَعَا بِدَعَوَاتٍ ثُمَّ قَالَ يَا أَبَا حَفْصٍ إِنَّهَا وَ اللَّهِ النَّخْلَةُ الَّتِي قَالَ اللَّهُ جَلَّ وَ عَزَّ لِمَرْيَمَ (عليها السلام) وَ هُزِّي إِلَيْكِ بِجِذْعِ النَّخْلَةِ تُساقِطْ عَلَيْكِ رُطَباً جَنِيًّا.

en.hubeali: H 14559 – And by this chain, from Hafs who said:

I saw Abu Abdullahasws alone in the gardens of Al-Kufa. Heasws came to a palm tree, so heasws performed ablution near it, then bowed and prostrated. I counted in hisasws prostration five hundred Glorifications (Tasbeeh). Then heasws leaned on the palm tree and supplicated by a supplication. Then heasws said: ‘O Abu Hafs! By Allahazwj, it is the palm tree about which Allahazwj Said to Maryamas: “[19:25] And shake towards you the trunk of the palm tree, it will drop on you fresh ripe dates”.
en.sarwar: 111. And by this chain, from Hafs who said: I saw Abu Abdullah (a.s.) alone in the gardens of Al-Kufa. He (a.s.) came to a palm tree, so he (a.s.) performed ablution near it, then bowed and prostrated. I counted in his (a.s.) prostration five hundred Glorifications (Tasbeeh). Then he (a.s.) leaned on the palm tree and supplicated by a supplication. Then he (a.s.) said: ‘O Abu Hafs! By Allah (azwj), it is the palm tree about which Allah (azwj) Said to Maryam (as): “[19:25] And shake towards you the trunk of the palm tree, it will drop on you fresh ripe dates”.
